pageDescription: After being made redundant, I realised I have repositories, but not an actual portfolio, then...
content: [{"id":"4e785022-2826-4489-bcaa-198a7bb38e2c","component":"Text","data":{"content":"Just over a week before writing this, I was made redundant. I realised that getting back into the job market meant I needed something to give me credibility. I had been scrolling through LinkedIn and noticed a lot of developers were being let go in large numbers. I thought about how I could stand out and maybe even help others in the same position. That is how CodeFolio came to be.","tag":"p","align":"left","weight":"regular","color":"","fontSize":"","fontFamily":"Inter, sans-serif","lineHeight":"","letterSpacing":"","marginBottom":"","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"0cb260e3-0fa7-4517-b18b-34bcc2f647c6","component":"Text","data":{"content":"I wanted a portfolio hosted on my GitHub account, free via GitHub Pages, where I could link to my repositories, explain my thought process, showcase my work, and maintain full control over both content and design. It was about owning my own data, presenting my work my way, and creating a resource that could genuinely set me apart.","tag":"p","align":"left","weight":"regular","color":"","fontSize":"","fontFamily":"Inter, sans-serif","lineHeight":"","letterSpacing":"","marginBottom":"","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"531f2d96-b1fc-44f3-971b-c191f35cabcd","component":"Text","data":{"content":"I also realised that if I built this portfolio builder as a standalone project and used it for my own portfolio, I could validate its use case while giving others a simple, ready made way to showcase their work. Another idea struck me as I thought about the future. Large language models are increasingly capable of understanding structured data like JSON. By designing CodeFolio to store content in a structured JSON format, it becomes not only easy to render and display but also easy for AI tools to parse.","tag":"p","align":"left","weight":"regular","color":"","fontSize":"","fontFamily":"Inter, sans-serif","lineHeight":"","letterSpacing":"","marginBottom":"","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"b6dd1340-15bd-44fc-93a7-43df3b38e5e8","component":"Text","data":{"content":"This allows other developers or automated tools to quickly analyse a portfolio, extract key projects, and generate summaries or insights. It opens the door to smarter recommendations, automated highlights, and better discoverability. By making the data machine readable, portfolios are futureproofed and ready to integrate with the next generation of AI driven tools.","tag":"p","align":"left","weight":"regular","color":"","fontSize":"","fontFamily":"Inter, sans-serif","lineHeight":"","letterSpacing":"","marginBottom":"","className":""},"children":[]}]
